description_long: This is an irregularly shaped stone with a predominantly grayish-white coloration, speckled with lighter and darker mineral inclusions throughout its surface. The stone has a rough, granular texture, with visible pitting and unevenness, suggesting it is a natural fragment rather than a cut or polished piece. One side features a patch of blue writing or marking, likely for identification or cataloging purposes. The stone's form is asymmetrical, with one side more sloped and pointed, while the opposite side is broader and flatter. Its surface shows signs of minor weathering, with some areas appearing slightly smoother, possibly from abrasion or handling. The overall appearance is typical of stones found in urban landscaping or as part of a barrier or obstacle in parks and public spaces.
description: An irregular, grayish-white stone with speckled mineral inclusions and a rough, granular texture, featuring blue identification markings on one side.
description_view_0: The broadest side of the stone, showing its speckled surface and overall irregular shape, with the most visible mineral inclusions.
description_view_1: A narrow, edge-on view highlighting the stone's thickness and the rough, uneven texture along its side.
description_view_2: A sloped side with blue writing clearly visible, showing the stone's pointed end and some surface pitting.
description_view_3: Another edge view, displaying the stone's granular surface and the transition between its broader and narrower faces.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or obstacle on the ground
attribute_pattern: Irregular mottling and speckling from mineral inclusions, with no regular or artificial patterning.
attribute_weathering: Slightly weathered with a rough, granular surface and minor smoothing in some areas, indicating moderate exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Typically blends with natural landscaping stones but may contrast with paved or manicured urban surfaces; can be partially surrounded by soil or grass.
